case_title: JUAN CARLOS GONZALEZ VS. CARLOS MANUEL DIAZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, CARLOS MANUEL $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CARLOS MANUEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CARLOS MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS DIAZ, CARLOS MANUEL
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS, ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
